name: Amazon Ads
description: Amazon Ads is an advertising platform that enables businesses to promote products and services across Amazon's ecosystem, including Amazon.com, Fire TV, Kindle, and third-party publisher sites through the Amazon Ad Network. It uses the Amazon Ad System (amazon-adsystem.com) for ad delivery and tracking.
advantages: Access to Amazon's massive shopper audience and purchase intent data
Self-serve ad platform with flexible budgeting options
Multi-channel advertising across search, display, and video
disadvantages: Competitive CPC pricing for popular product categories
Ad policies and restrictions can be complex
Limited targeting options compared to Google or Meta
Reporting data can have attribution delays
